name: Content, Mobs, Biomes
description:
Not much time for me to explain everything. You can always ask around but-

/y/lExplore the world as you wish. Discover /y/lthe small things./x

I made this modpack to make sure nobody misses out on anything in terms of progression after all.

I'll be building, relaxing. and working to improve this new game.

/pWhat about you?/x
